name: Chicken Breasts with Lime & Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1 Rinse the split chicken breasts and pat them dry.
2 Peel the lime and remove all white pith. Cut the lime into thin slices and tuck the slices under the breast skin.
3 On waxed paper, combine the bread crumbs, cilantro, garlic, salt, and pepper.
4 In a shallow dish, beat the egg whites and water.
5 Dip each chicken breast in the egg whites, then coat with the bread crumb mixture.
6 Place the skin side down on a rack of a broiler pan.
7 Broil 6-8 inches from the heat source for 10 minutes on each side.
8 Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9 Transfer the chicken to the oven and bake for 10 minutes, or until the meat near the bone is no longer pink when cut with a knife.
